evidence.q1: Except for the closed list in Section 4
evidence.q2: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class. "Permitted Transferee" means an affiliate, estate planning vehicle, or family member...
evidence.q3: within 15 days after month-end; at any time without limitation
